summary: Herion Iteration 13 Testing Complete - Resend Email Integration. 20/20 backend tests passed, all frontend features verified. Full draft → review → approve → send flow working with Resend.

ui_bugs.issue: React hydration warning: <span> cannot be a child of <option>. This is a minor console warning that doesn't affect functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: EmailCenterPage.jsx line 241 - option element contains dynamic content that causes React hydration warning. Consider using plain text instead of JSX expressions inside option tags.

test_credentials.creator: gegexia94@gmail.com / PROTECTED (env only)
test_credentials.resend_verified_email: gegexia94@gmail.com (only email that can receive in Resend test mode)

seed_data_creation: Multiple email drafts created during testing for Nexus S.r.l. practice
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 tested the Resend email integration. All 20 backend tests pass. Email system features: POST /api/emails/draft (creates draft with compliance check), GET /api/emails/drafts (list), GET /api/emails/drafts/{id} (detail), PUT /api/emails/drafts/{id} (update), POST /api/emails/drafts/{id}/submit-review, POST /api/emails/drafts/{id}/approve (admin only), POST /api/emails/drafts/{id}/send (admin only, uses Resend), GET /api/emails/summary. Compliance checks block drafts if attachments not found, sensitivity blocked, or signatures missing. Timeline events logged for email_draft_created, email_submitted_review, email_approved, email_sent. Audit events logged for email actions. Password reset uses Resend (not mock). Resend test mode only allows sending to verified email (gegexia94@gmail.com).

details: Draft with no attachments → compliant (draft status)
Returns single draft with full details
Only approved emails can be sent
Wraps content in Herion-branded HTML template
Returns counts by status (total, draft, review, approved, sent, failed, blocked)

audit_logging.details: Email actions logged in governance audit with entity_type='email'

password_reset_resend.details: Uses Resend to send password reset emails (not mock)

features_verified: Page loads with Italian text ('Centro Email')
Summary section shows counts by status
Filter buttons work (Tutte, Bozza, In Revisione, Approvata, Inviata, Fallita, Bloccata)
Email list displays items with status badges
Create draft form with practice selector, recipient, subject, body
Action buttons: Revisione (draft), Approva (review, admin only), Invia (approved, admin only)

resend_integration.test_mode_restriction: Only verified email (gegexia94@gmail.com) can receive emails in test mode
